response.text:

rationale: r3c5's SoC (35%) is below your minimum threshold (40%), and your conservative policy with declining autonomy requires preserving the 40% floor; geographic requests without established trust circles cannot override self-preservation in islanded conditions.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Monitoring for grid reconnection and genuine emergency signals..
